title: Thinking in Systems: A Primer
author: Donella H. Meadows
rationale: The definitive primer on systems thinking by the lead author of The Limits to Growth. Essential companion to Senge's The Fifth Discipline — where Senge focuses on organizational learning, Meadows provides the foundational conceptual toolkit (stocks, flows, feedback loops, leverage points) applicable across all domains. Her 12 leverage points framework is one of the most cited intervention heuristics in the field.
